import api from'./axiosInstance';export const invoiceApi={list:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/invoices',{params});},get:id=>api.get(`/invoices/${id}`),create:data=>api.post('/invoices',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put(`/invoices/${id}`,data),updatePayment:(id,paid)=>api.patch(`/invoices/${id}/payment`,{paid}),delete:id=>api.delete(`/invoices/${id}`),stats:()=>api.get('/invoices/stats'),generatePDF:id=>api.post(`/invoices/${id}/pdf/generate`),// Authenticated download — returns binary blob with JWT header attached
downloadPDF:id=>api.get(`/invoices/${id}/pdf/download`,{responseType:'blob'}),shareEmail:(id,data)=>api.post(`/invoices/${id}/share/email`,data),shareWhatsApp:(id,phone)=>api.post(`/invoices/${id}/share/whatsapp`,{phone})};
